selectors/SelectorKey/data.name: data
selectors/SelectorKey/data.description: Optional opaque data associated to this file object: for example, this could be used to store a per-client session ID.

info.excerpt: Optional opaque data associated to this file object: for example, this could be used to store a per-client session ID.

selectors/DefaultSelector.name: DefaultSelector
selectors/DefaultSelector.description: The default selector class, using the most efficient implementation available on the current platform. This should be the default choice for most users.

info.excerpt: The default selector class, using the most efficient implementation available on the current platform. This should be the default choice for most users.

selectors/DevpollSelector.name: DevpollSelector
selectors/DevpollSelector.description: select.devpoll()-based selector. fileno()¶ This returns the file descriptor used by the underlying select.devpoll() object. Added in version 3.5.

info.excerpt: select.devpoll()-based selector. fileno()¶ This returns the file descriptor used by the underlying select.devpoll() object. Added in version 3.5.
